assertion_results.text: Form layout is single-column on mobile — grid-cols-2 is either removed or gated behind a responsive breakpoint prefix (sm: or md:)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 15 and 117: grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2. col-span-2 changed to sm:col-span-2.

assertion_results.text: Currency or numeric inputs use inputMode='decimal' or inputMode='numeric' instead of type='number'
assertion_results.evidence: ZIP: inputMode='numeric' (line 78). CVV: inputMode='numeric' (line 159). Tip: inputMode='decimal' (line 178). Card: inputMode='numeric' (line 128). All use type='text'. Comments explain why type='number' is an antipattern.

assertion_results.text: At least one input includes an enterKeyHint attribute ('next', 'done', or 'send')
assertion_results.evidence: All intermediate fields have enterKeyHint='next' (lines 29, 40, 53, 66, 80, 96, 108, 131, 145, 165). Last field (Tip) has enterKeyHint='done' (line 182). Comment explains chaining for keyboard flow.

assertion_results.text: The submit button is NOT position:fixed at the bottom — it flows inline with the form, or uses a keyboard-safe sticky pattern with safe-area padding
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 223-234: Submit footer is a plain <div> in flow, not fixed. Comment references WebKit bug #202120 explaining why fixed/sticky bottom fails during keyboard display. Has pb-[max(1rem,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] for safe-area.

assertion_results.text: The form container uses dvh (min-h-[100dvh]) instead of vh
assertion_results.evidence: Line 6: min-h-[100dvh] on outer flex container. Comment explains 'dvh tracks the visual viewport (including keyboard collapse), unlike old vh which is fixed.'

assertion_results.text: Form labels are above their inputs, not beside them in a horizontal layout
assertion_results.evidence: All labels use className='block text-sm font-medium mb-1' (e.g., lines 18, 35, 50). Block display with margin-bottom places them above the input.
